zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Somery於1151年出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利時，他的父親John de Somery26歲，母親Hawise Paynel7歲。他和Margaret Crassus至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1211年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.Dudley, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾杜德利
zh-hans.Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾迪納斯
zh-hans.Dudley, Worcestershire, England,: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Somery于1151年出生在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利时，他的父亲John de Somery26岁，母亲Hawise Paynel7岁。他和Margaret Crassus至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1211年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Somery was born in 1151, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, his father, John de Somery, was 26 and his mother, Hawise Paynel, was 7. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Crassus. He died in 1211, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Somery est né en 1151, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Somery, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hawise Paynel, avait 7 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Crassus. Il est décédé en 1211, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Somery 1151 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Somery 26 und seine Mutter Hawise Paynel 7. Er hatte mit Margaret Crassus mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Somery è nato il nel 1151 nel Dudley, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John de Somery, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Paynel, aveva 7 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Crassus. Morì nel 1211, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiltshire, England.

ja.Dudley, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリー

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Someryが1151年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父John de Someryは26歳，母Hawise Paynelは7歳であった。彼はMargaret Crassusとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1211年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Somery(이)가 1151년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Somery(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Paynel(은)는 7세였다. 그는 Margaret Crassus(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

mn.Dudley, Worcestershire, England,: Duddan Leah, Wigreceastrescīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Somery nasceu em 1151, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Somery, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Paynel, tinha 7 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Crassus. Ele faleceu em 1211, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Somery родился в 1151 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Somery было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Paynel, 7. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Margaret Crassus. Он умер в 1211 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия.

sm.between 1194 and 1210: mai le 1194 e o'o I le 1210

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Somery nació en 1151, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Somery, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hawise Paynel, tenía 7 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Crassus. Murió en 1211, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
